testcase.name: test_post_returns_immediately_with_job_id

failure.message: AssertionError: POST took 8.20s - MUST be under 5 seconds! This defeats the purpose of the async fix. assert 8.19772458076477 < 5.0

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_pdf_parse_async.py:72: in test_post_returns_immediately_with_job_id assert elapsed_time < 5.0, f"POST took {elapsed_time:.2f}s - MUST be under 5 seconds! This defeats the purpose of the async fix." E AssertionError: POST took 8.20s - MUST be under 5 seconds! This defeats the purpose of the async fix. E assert 8.19772458076477 < 5.0
